summary.summary: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.3.7 to 0.8.3.8. The commit message and diff indicate only the APP_DEV_VERSION line was changed; APP_VERSION remains 0.8.3 and APP_BUILD_NUMBER remains 1.
summary.userFacingImpact: No functional user-facing behavior change is indicated by the diff; this modifies a development version metadata value in Config.xcconfig. If further impact assessment is required (e.g., CI or release tooling that reads APP_DEV_VERSION), perform a human review against those systems.
